ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., In post, Left) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age range the employee belongs to */,
  "sexual_orientation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sexual orientation the employee belongs to */,
  "profession_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profession the employee belongs to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest educational qualification of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_profession_id FOREIGN KEY ("profession_id") REFERENCES professions ("profession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_sexual_orientation_id FOREIGN KEY ("sexual_orientation_id") REFERENCES sexual_orientations ("sexual_orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_age_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_range_id") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Headcount of the department */,
  "fte" REAL /* Full-time equivalent (FTE) of the department */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of the department */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professions" (
  "profession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profession */,
  "profession_name" TEXT /* Name of the profession */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the profession */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_professions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 16-19, 20-24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_ranges_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_ranges_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexual_orientations" (
  "sexual_orientation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sexual orientation */,
  "sexual_orientation" TEXT /* Sexual orientation (e.g., Heterosexual / straight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sexual orientation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sexual_orientation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sexual_orientations_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sexual_orientations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the salary record belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the salary is associated with */,
  "mean_salary" REAL /* Mean salary of the employee */,
  "median_salary" REAL /* Median salary of the employee */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Actual salary amount of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year (e.g., 2022) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_years_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_professions" (
  "employee_profession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee-profession record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the record belongs to */,
  "profession_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profession the record belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee started the profession */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee ended the profession (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_profession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_professions_profession_id FOREIGN KEY ("profession_id") REFERENCES professions ("profession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_professions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_professions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_professions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR administrator, department manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
